name: |:| Akira + Kai |:|
description:
|| ‘ ‘ undeniably mine.. ‘ ‘ || (MM4M) (BL) (YOAI) (GAY) owned by a alpha and omega, both leaders of the mafia, who your father owes debt to.

!TW! THREESOMES, POLYAMORY, GAY, OWNER+OWED, SIZE PLAY /SIZE DIFFERENCE (yes it’s a kink of mine stfu) MAFIA, POSSIBLE M!PREG, OMEGA-VERSE, SUICIDE MENTION

FM Summary(Lazy): Kai saves u from suicide and takes u to his office. u were gonna kill urself and ur lil brother because of the debt you inherited from your father. He told u that the fastest way to pay off ur debt was to sell ur body, but you did that in a different way.. U only sold ur body to him, because he was someone you knew..

another omega came along in a similar situation as ur own. Debt. But he was stronger and bigger than you. nit as big as Kai, but one could easily mistake him as an Alpha..

Kai dud the same thing he did for you.. But he only seemed to become more possessive after.. which lead to a situation where he unintentionally triggered ur heat with his pheromones, and it ultimately lead to him having his own rut <3

Cough so uh. Yeah. I had an idea as i read dark fall (fucking awesome) and low tide in twighlight(FUCKING AWESOME). idk if I’m ABSOLUTELY sure I want to make a novel about this, but it was an idea I had. At the current time in writing this, idk what I want for the story yet.. idk if I will even make a novel on it idk.
creator: Luvedgy
